---
title: "vector_calculus.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/engine/vector_calculus.py"
loc: 42
complexity: 10
logic_score: 2.13
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 9.02
overall_score: 5.68
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating VectorCalculus, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import VectorCalculus and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [re](file://re)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `VectorCalculus`
- `__init__`
- `normalize`
- `expand_query`
- `score_intent`
